title: Lastrea stierii
taxonomy: Lastrea stierii is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Lastrea and is classified as a vascular plant. The classification of Lastrea stierii is further divided into kingdom Plantae, division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, and family Thelypteridaceae. This fern is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The exact classification of Lastrea stierii may vary slightly depending on the source.

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
